Beautiful Boy (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $7,634,767Details
International Box Office $9,691,265
Worldwide Box Office $17,326,032
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The heartbreaking and inspiring experience of survival and recovery in a family coping with addiction over many years.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$218,888 (2.9% of total gross)
Legs:5.26 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/1,052 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $10,022,910

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 12th, 2018 (Limited) by Amazon Studios
International Releases: October 19th, 2018 (Wide) (Australia)
November 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (Portugal)
November 30th, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
December 7th, 2018 (Wide) (Taiwan)
January 4th, 2019 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
Video Release: January 3rd, 2019 by Prime Video
MPA Rating: R for drug content throughout, language, and brief sexual material.
(Rating bulletin 2519 (Cert #51526), 3/21/2018)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Same Role, Multiple Actors
Plot point: Addiction, Biography, Off the Wagon / Relapse, Rehab / Former Addict
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Plan B Entertainment, Amazon Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
